name: Altitude Go Secured Visa Card
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, but requires a refundable $300–$5,000 security deposit to set your limit

verdict.text: Same 4x dining as the unsecured Altitude Go — good for rebuilding credit

earn_rates.category: Dining, takeout & restaurant delivery — first $2,000/qtr, then 1×

earn_note: Identical earn structure to the unsecured Altitude Go — this is one of the few secured cards that doesn't earn a worse rate than its unsecured sibling. Discount stores/supercenters and wholesale clubs are excluded from the grocery and gas bonus categories.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account
Merchandise, gift cards, travel, or statement credit

points.note: Same redemption menu as the unsecured card — value tops out around 1¢/point regardless of method.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — points redeem directly for cash, travel, merchandise, or gift cards at a flat rate.

credits.name: Streaming Credit
credits.subtitle: auto-applies · 11 consecutive months of streaming purchases
credits.description: A $15 statement credit automatically applied after 11 consecutive calendar months of eligible streaming purchases, if the account is in good standing.
tips: Stacks with the 2× streaming earn rate — you get the points and the credit.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published specifically for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: Refundable security deposit
services.detail: $300–$5,000, held in a secured savings account, sets your credit limit dollar-for-dollar.

services.name: Automatic graduation path
services.detail: U.S. Bank monitors your account and may automatically graduate you to the unsecured Altitude Go Visa Signature Card, returning your deposit.

services.name: Choose your due date
services.detail: Pick a payment due date that fits your schedule.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns points on their spend (into your account)
Their activity is reported to the credit bureaus too, on the same account

additional_cards.note: Free to add — since this account reports to all three bureaus, an authorized user benefits from the payment history alongside the primary cardholder.
